caption: The video features Sanjeev Mohan, identified as the Principal of SanjMo, speaking at an event held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. He is dressed in a formal black suit and appears to be engaged in a discussion or interview, likely related to technology or business, given the sponsorship by MongoDB. The background shows a bustling environment with several people interacting, suggesting a conference or networking event. Sanjeev gestures with his hands as he speaks, indicating an animated conversation. The setting is professional, with a focus on the speaker, while the audience and other attendees are slightly out of focus in the background.
